events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess 4-gas monitor readings for confined space pre-entry. Readings: O2 20.7 %VOL, LEL 2%, H2S 3 ppm, CO 5 ppm. Need acceptable entry limits per OSHA 1910.146. Typical: O2 between 19.5% and 23.5%; LEL <10% (often <10% of LEL, some standards 0% for hot work? For entry generally <10%); H2S <10 ppm (ceiling 10 ppm, 15 min STEL 15 ppm); CO <35 ppm (TWA 35 ppm, ceiling 200 ppm). So all readings within acceptable. Decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage planned. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 0? Since pre-entry test planned but not started? Stage planned, percent 0. value maybe 0? Could use 0. findings none. actions none. rationale. references OSHA 1910.146. Need ensure JSON valid.
